prose: **Aniline Fukui Reactivity Analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral); cation and anion states at charge +1 and −1 with multiplicity 2. Geometry: input structure from aniline.xyz, fixed (single-point, not re-optimized). SCF converged for all three electronic states. Charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0000, sum(f⁻) = 1.0000). **Most electrophilic site:** C at position 3 (ortho), f⁺ = 2.2976. **Most nucleophilic site:** N (nitrogen in NH₂), f⁻ = 0.2045. Full atom-by-atom Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptor computed and reported above. Visualization and live-run log available at paths given. Integrity: trustworthy (ok).
